hero_title: From Bhumi Poojan to Grih Pravesh, your dream home built right.
hero_subtitle: End-to-end home construction with transparent pricing, expert supervision, quality materials, on-time delivery, and a 10-year warranty.
problems_subtitle: We built GrihNirmaan after seeing too many families burnt by these exact issues. Here's how we fixed each one.
problem_fraud_text: Disappearing builders, half-done sites, lost deposits. Sound familiar?
problem_pricing_text: Hidden costs, mid-project surprises, no itemised breakdown.
problem_approval_text: LDA, RERA, Nagar Nigam — endless paperwork & runaround.
problem_vendor_text: Coordinating 12 different agencies — you become the project manager.
problem_warranty_text: Cracks, leaks, faulty wiring — and nobody to call once payment is done.
services_subtitle: 12 specialised teams, one accountable partner — from soil testing to housewarming.
step_vision_text: Share your plot details, budget, and dream home brief.
step_design_text: IIA architects design your home; we handle all approvals.
step_construction_text: Vetted crews build with weekly progress photos.
step_movein_text: Grih Pravesh, handover, and 10-year structural warranty.
featured_projects_subtitle: Explore some of our recent residential construction projects in Lucknow.

calc_heading: How much will your home cost?

diff_govt_text: In-house liaison team with 200+ LDA & Nagar Nigam approvals processed.
diff_escrow_text: Your money is released milestone-by-milestone, not upfront.
diff_brands_text: Direct tie-ups with Havells, Jaquar, UltraTech, Asian Paints & more.
diff_local_text: 15+ years in Lucknow, 500+ homes, 18 localities mapped.
how_it_works_subtitle: From Bhumi Poojan to Grih Pravesh, our 12-step home-building journey is simplified into 4 clear milestones.
